ownership_chain: Proton Foundation - Swiss non-profit (majority shareholder since June 2024)
Employee Stock Ownership - Employee ownership program

ubos.name: Andy Yen
ubos.background: Harvard PhD candidate, CERN researcher, Founded Proton 2014

ProtonVPN.cern_connection: All 3 founders met at CERN. ProtonMail initially developed using CERN infrastructure in 2013-2014.
ProtonVPN.transparency: Open source apps, regular third-party audits (SEC Consult, Securitum), warrant canary active

intelligence_connections.notes: CERN connection raises theoretical questions but no evidence of intelligence infiltration

ProtonVPN.five_eyes_status: Switzerland NOT Five Eyes - strong privacy jurisdiction

ownership_chain: Amagicom AB - Swedish privat aktiebolag (private limited company)
Mullvad VPN.notable: No email required, account numbers only, accepts cash payments by mail
Mullvad VPN.transparency: Open source apps, regular audits (Assured AB, Cure53, Radically Open Security)

coercion_events.details: Police executed search warrant at Mullvad HQ. No customer data available - police left empty-handed.
Mullvad fought Swedish data retention law, appealed to EU courts

intelligence_connections.notes: Swedish FRA surveillance law but Mullvad has proven coercion resistance

Mullvad VPN.five_eyes_status: Sweden NOT Five Eyes but IS Nine Eyes member (intelligence sharing with Five Eyes)

Windscribe.transparency: Open source apps, some audits, transparency reports published

coercion_events.details: Servers in Kyiv seized by Ukrainian authorities. Critical security flaw discovered - API keys stored in cleartext.
coercion_events.outcome: Exposed all users of affected servers

coercion_events.details: Received 3 government requests, no data provided due to technical impossibility

Windscribe.major_security_incident: 2021 Ukraine seizure revealed insecure OpenVPN key management - all affected users potentially compromised

intelligence_connections.notes: Canadian Five Eyes jurisdiction creates inherent intelligence sharing risk

Windscribe.five_eyes_status: Canada IS Five Eyes founding member - full intelligence sharing with US, UK, Australia, NZ

VyprVPN.notable: Owns all servers (no third-party hosting), proprietary Chameleon protocol
VyprVPN.transparency: No-logs audits (2018, 2020), SOC 2 Type II certified

intelligence_connections.notes: US operations create Five Eyes exposure despite Swiss incorporation. Founders are American with Texas operations base.

VyprVPN.five_eyes_status: Switzerland NOT Five Eyes, but US operations create Five Eyes jurisdiction exposure

Hola VPN.corporate_entity: Hola Networks Ltd (formerly Hola Better Internet)
ownership_chain: Hola Networks Ltd - Israeli private company

ubos.name: Ofer Vilenski
ubos.background: Israeli entrepreneur, co-founded Jungo (acquired by NDS/Cisco)

Hola VPN.notable: P2P network - users share bandwidth with other users

major_controversies.details: Hola sold user bandwidth through Luminati proxy service. Users became exit nodes unknowingly.
Hack traced to Luminati/Hola exit nodes. User computers used for illegal activities.

intelligence_connections.notes: Israeli jurisdiction. Founders sold Jungo to NDS (acquired by Cisco). NDS alleged ties to Israeli intelligence Unit 8200. Bright Data has documented contracts with US law enforcement.

Hola VPN.five_eyes_status: Israel NOT Five Eyes but has extensive intelligence cooperation with Five Eyes nations

Hotspot Shield (AnchorFree/Pango).parent_company: Aura (NASDAQ: AURA) - publicly traded, cybersecurity conglomerate

intelligence_connections.notes: US jurisdiction. Ad-tech background. 2017 CDT complaint about data collection practices.

Hotspot Shield (AnchorFree/Pango).five_eyes_status: United States IS Five Eyes founding member - full intelligence sharing

ownership_chain: McAfee LLC - American global computer security software company
Acquired by Advent International and TPG Capital (2021)
Now part of McAfee Corp - private equity owned

acquisition.details: Acquired for undisclosed sum, continues operating as standalone brand

parent_evolution: 2021-present: McAfee (private equity owned by Advent International and TPG Capital)
TunnelBear.transparency: Annual transparency reports, independent audits by Cure53
